riskAdjusted.label: Balanced
riskAdjusted.description: Balanced baseline with the shared value screen, a 0.50% per-bet cap, and a 1.50% nightly budget on the reference bankroll.

aggressive.label: Aggressive
aggressive.description: Aggressive baseline with the shared value screen, a 0.50% per-bet cap, and a 1.50% nightly budget on the reference bankroll.

capitalPreservation.label: Conservative
capitalPreservation.description: Conservative baseline with the shared value screen, a 0.50% per-bet cap, and a 1.50% nightly budget on the reference bankroll.

strategy_optimization.method: Static defaults active until matched replay coverage reaches at least 60 settled games across 20 replay days (current sample: 109 games across 15 days).
